# Change: Update demo-capability spec

**Change Type**: spec-only

## Why
Update the canonical spec for demo-capability to add new requirements discovered during review.

## What Changes
- Add requirements for the new validation behavior
- Document edge-case scenarios

## Impact
- Affected specs: `demo-capability`
- Affected code: none

## Non-Goals
- No runtime implementation in this change

## Success Criteria
- Canonical spec updated with new requirements
- All scenarios documented and reviewable
